fixes.description: Restored Storage_reserves PROCESS node (had been trimmed in BUILDER iter 3)
fixes.reason: Failures T072 (ABI3 KO), T073 (FUS3 KO), T074 (LEC1 KO), T075 (LEC2 KO), and T118 (ABI4 KO) all predicted INCREASED instead of DECREASED because removal of Storage_reserves left ABI5⊣Seed_Size as the dominant LAFL effector. Loss of any LAFL TF released ABI5 inhibition, predicting larger seeds. Biology: LAFL TF KOs cause maturation defects -> smaller seeds.
fixes.biological_justification: Storage reserve accumulation (proteins, lipids, starch) determines final seed mass. Storage-deficient mutants (e.g., wri1) produce smaller, lighter seeds. Restoring this aggregate process node lets the LAFL→maturation→seed-size relationship propagate correctly.

fixes.description: Removed AGG3→Seed_Size direct edge (N128) to free a phenotype-activator slot for Storage_reserves
fixes.reason: Phenotype 5-activator hard cap (Trap 4). AGG3 still routes to phenotype indirectly via AGB1→AGG3→Cell_Proliferation_Duration→Cell_Proliferation→Ovule_size→Seed_Size, so this preserves AGG3's effect while making room for Storage_reserves.
fixes.biological_justification: AGG3 G-gamma subunit acts on seed size primarily by extending the cell-proliferation phase (Li et al. 2012); the indirect routing captures this mechanism without inflating phenotype activator count.

fixes.reason: T074 lec1 KO predicts increased; biology decreased. Adding direct LAFL→Storage_reserves→Seed_Size cascade.
fixes.biological_justification: LEC1 (LEAFY COTYLEDON 1) NF-YB subunit master TF activates seed storage protein (e.g., 2S albumins, 12S globulins) and oil biosynthesis genes during maturation. Verdier & Thompson 2008 review.

fixes.reason: Same root cause as T074; LEC2 is part of LAFL maturation core.
fixes.biological_justification: LEC2 B3-domain TF activates seed-storage protein and oleosin gene expression, partially redundantly with LEC1/FUS3.

fixes.reason: T073 fus3 KO; FUS3 is canonical maturation TF.
fixes.biological_justification: FUS3 B3-domain TF directly activates SSP and oil biosynthesis genes; fus3 mutants have severely reduced seed reserves.

fixes.reason: T072 abi3 KO; ABI3 binds RY motifs in seed maturation gene promoters.
fixes.biological_justification: ABI3 (FUS3 paralog with ABA-responsive role) is required for seed-storage protein accumulation; abi3 mutants are storage-deficient.

fixes.reason: Connects the maturation cascade to phenotype, completing LAFL→Storage_reserves→Seed_Size path that was broken when Storage_reserves was trimmed.
fixes.biological_justification: Reserve accumulation determines final seed mass and dry weight (Baud & Lepiniec 2008); storage-deficient mutants produce smaller, lighter seeds.

results.reason: Best-method (RWR) improved from 83.7% to 89.4% (+5.7%). κ rose from 0.69 (substantial) to 0.80 (substantial, near-perfect). ODE also gained +5.8%. Algebraic dropped 0.9% but the BUILDER hard-rule decision uses best-method accuracy as the headline; the gain on the other two methods more than compensates.
